subject: Re: ts_import failing
body:
(For reference, my ts_import command is as follows but I see that yours is
different:)

WarpTools ts_import \
--mdocs 13014/data/ \
--pattern "*.mdoc" \
--frameseries warp_frameseries \
--tilt_exposure 2.03 \
--dont_invert \
--output tomostar \
--override_axis 85

On Fri, Mar 13, 2026 at 3:45 PM Alice Eruera <eruera@hkl.hms.harvard.edu>
wrote:

> Hi Gerardo,
>
> I had the exact same issue you're describing while reconstructing a
> dataset just the other day. Long story short, after spending several hours
> troubleshooting, I tried changing the selection status for all the frames.
> After I set all the selection statuses to 'selected', my tilt-series
> imported normally and the mdoc files parsed just fine. I don't know why the
> frames were automatically deselected for some reason.
>
> Perhaps the same thing has happened to you. I suggest you try it and see
> if it helps. In your project directory, run:
>
> WarpTools change_selection --settings warp_frameseries.settings --select
> path/to/your/frames/*tif
>
> and then,
>
> WarpTools ts_import  --mdocs ./test_symLinked/test_mdoc_ts1 --frameseries
> test_frameseries_ts1 --tilt_exposure 2.93 --output test-tomostarls
>
> Hope this helps!
> Alice
>
>
> On Fri, Mar 13, 2026 at 1:50 PM G Perez Goncalves <
> goncalvesgm123@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> Hi all,
>>
>> I am trying to get started with processing some data collected using
>> SerialEM in warp, and I was able to get what I think were sucessful mc and
>> ctf, but then my pipeline keeps failing on import. It is able to parse the
>> mdoc files, but it seems to remove every single tilt "based on selection
>> status, max tilt angle and masked fraction criteria" even with the
>> defaults. It does not outright fail, the job finishes saying that all of
>> the tilts were removed but does not write into tomostar. I have run it with
>> a single tilt series worth of tilts right now at a time to try to
>> troubleshoot, but nothing has worked.
>>
>>  Has anyone run into a problem that sounds like this/could help to
>> troubleshoot? Here is my input command:
>>
>> WarpTools ts_import
>> [tab]--mdocs ./test_symLinked/test_mdoc_ts1
>> [tab]--frameseries test_frameseries_ts1
>> [tab]--tilt_exposure 2.93
>> [tab]--output test-tomostarls
